tagline: The toolkit that powers everything else.
longDescription:
YouCoded is the foundational toolkit that powers the personal-AI side of YouCoded — the safety hooks that prevent destructive writes, the diagnostic commands (`/health`, `/update`, `/diagnose`, `/restore`) that keep your install honest, and the cross-device sync infrastructure that moves your settings between Mac, Windows, Linux, and Android. It's the glue layer most other YouCoded plugins quietly assume is already there.

Install this first. Once it's in, you get write-guards that block stomping on memory and CLAUDE.md from concurrent sessions, a `setup-wizard` for pure-CLI users who aren't running the app, and a `theme-builder` that lets you generate full custom theme packs from a one-line vibe prompt. The toolkit is plain markdown skills + bash hooks — no opaque binaries, all readable in your editor.
